name: Basic Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tomatoes, crushed and mixed well with their juices
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion and garlic in the olive oil over medium heat until translucent, but not brown (about 10 minutes).
2. Add the thyme and carrot and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
3. Add the tomatoes. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat to just bubbling, stirring occasionally for 30 minutes.
4. Season with salt to taste.
5. Serve immediately or set aside for further use. The sauce may be refrigerated for up to one week or frozen for up to 6 months.
